name: UNITIL CORP
summary: Unitil Corporation is a public utility holding company incorporated in New Hampshire in 1984. It distributes electricity and natural gas to approximately 215,100 customers across New Hampshire, Massachusetts, and Maine through five distribution utilities: Unitil Energy, Fitchburg, Northern Utilities, Bangor Natural Gas, and Maine Natural Gas. It also operates Granite State, an interstate natural gas transmission pipeline. Total operating revenue was $536.0 million in 2025, with net utility plant of $1.8 billion.

products.name: Electric Distribution
products.description: Local distribution of electricity to ~110,100 customers in New Hampshire and Massachusetts.

products.name: Natural Gas Distribution
products.description: Local distribution of natural gas to ~105,000 customers in New Hampshire, Massachusetts, and Maine.

products.name: Interstate Natural Gas Transmission
products.description: Granite State operates 85 miles of underground gas transmission pipeline in Maine and New Hampshire.

products.name: Utility Administrative Services
products.description: Unitil Service provides centralized regulatory, financial, accounting, engineering, and operations services to affiliates at cost.

products.name: Solar Facility
products.description: Unitil Energy solar facility on Kingston, NH land, became operational May 2025.
